name: current
desc: A simple yet powerful state management library for Flutter.

name: BusyStatusChanged
desc: Event that is added to the state stream when the busy status of the view model changes.

name: Current
desc:
Used to provide shared state and functions across specific scopes of your application, or the
entire application itself.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: of
desc: Gets the instance of the CurrentApp that matches the generic type argument T.

name: viewModelOf
desc: Gets the CurrentViewModel from the CurrentApp that matches the generic type argument T.

name: CurrentApp
desc: This widget is not intended to be created manually and is used by the Current widget.

name: updateShouldNotify
desc: Whether the framework should notify widgets that inherit from this widget.

name: CurrentBoolProperty
desc:
An CurrentProperty with similar characteristics as a an
ordinary dart bool object

name: isFalse
desc: Whether the underlying value is false

name: isTrue
desc: Whether the underlying value is true

name: setFalse
desc: Sets the value to false

name: setTrue
desc: Sets the value to true

name: CurrentDateTimeProperty
desc:
An CurrentProperty with similar characteristics as a an
ordinary dart DateTime object

name: CurrentDateTimeProperty.now
desc: Factory constructor for initializing an CurrentDateTimeProperty to the current Date/Time.

name: add
desc: Returns a new DateTime instance with duration added to this CurrentDateTimeProperty.

name: compareTo
desc:
Compares this DateTime object to other,
returning zero if the values are equal.

name: day
desc: The day of the month [1..31].

name: difference
desc: this CurrentDateTimeProperty.

name: hour
desc: The hour of the day, expressed as in a 24-hour clock [0..23].

name: isAfter
desc: Returns true if this CurrentDateTimeProperty occurs after other.

name: isAtSameMomentAs
desc: Returns true if this CurrentDateTimeProperty occurs at the same moment as other.

name: isBefore
desc: Returns true if this CurrentDateTimeProperty occurs before other.

name: isUtc
desc: True if this DateTime is set to UTC time.

name: microsecond
desc: The microsecond [0...999].

name: microsecondsSinceEpoch
desc:
The number of microseconds since
the "Unix epoch" 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z (UTC).

name: millisecond
desc: The millisecond [0...999].

name: millisecondsSinceEpoch
desc:
The number of milliseconds since
the "Unix epoch" 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z (UTC).

name: minute
desc: The minute [0...59].

name: month
desc: The month [1..12].

name: parse
desc: Constructs a new CurrentDateTimeProperty instance based on formattedString.

name: second
desc: The second [0...59].

name: subtract
desc: Returns a new DateTime instance with duration subtracted from this CurrentDateTimeProperty.

name: timeZoneName
desc: The time zone name.

name: timeZoneOffset
desc:
The time zone offset, which
is the difference between local time and UTC.

name: toIso8601String
desc: Returns an ISO-8601 full-precision extended format representation.

name: toLocal
desc: Returns this DateTime value in the local time zone.

name: toNow
desc: Sets the DateTime value to the current date and time.

name: toNowUtc
desc: Sets the DateTime value to the current date and time in UTC.

name: toUtc
desc: Returns this DateTime value in the UTC time zone.

name: weekday
desc: The day of the week monday..sunday.

name: year
desc: The year.

name: CurrentDateTimeTextController
desc: A CurrentTextController that can only be bound to a CurrentProperty of type DateTime.

name: CurrentDoubleProperty
desc: An CurrentProperty with similar characteristics of dart double objects

name: CurrentDoubleProperty.zero
desc: Factory constructor for initializing an CurrentDoubleProperty to zero.

name: add
desc: Adds other to this number.

name: divide
desc: Divides this number by other.

name: isNegative
desc: Whether this number is negative.

name: mod
desc: Euclidean modulo of this number by other.

name: multiply
desc: Multiplies this number by other.

name: round
desc: Returns the integer closest to the double value.

name: roundToDouble
desc: Returns the integer double value closest to the double value.

name: subtract
desc: Subtracts other from this number.

name: toInt
desc: Truncates the double value and returns the int

name: toZero
desc: Sets the double value to zero.

name: CurrentFieldValidation
desc: Tracks validation metadata for a single CurrentProperty.

name: CurrentFieldValidation.new
desc: Creates a validator for the provided property.

name: addRule
desc: Adds a validation rule to this validator.

name: attachToViewModel
desc: Attaches this validator to the owning CurrentViewModel.

name: hasIssue
desc: Whether the validator currently has an issue.

name: hasValidated
desc: Whether validation has run at least once.

name: isTouched
desc: Whether the field has been marked as touched.

name: isValid
desc: Whether the current validation state is valid.

name: issue
desc: The current validation issue, if any.

name: issueForValue
desc: Evaluates the configured rules against value without mutating state.

name: markTouched
desc: Marks the field as touched without changing the current error state.

name: property
desc: The property whose value this validator describes.

name: reset
desc: Resets the validation metadata back to the untouched state.

name: resolveIssueText
desc: Resolves the current issue into display text.

name: setIssue
desc: Sets a validation issue manually.

name: state
desc: The current validation state.

name: validate
desc: Runs the validator rules against the current property value.

name: validateOnPropertyChange
desc: Whether validation should automatically re-run when property changes.

name: validationSourceHashCode
desc: Unique identifier for this validation instance.

name: CurrentGenericTextController
desc: A CurrentTextController that is bindable to a CurrentProperty of type T.

name: CurrentIntProperty
desc: An CurrentProperty with similar characteristics of dart int objects

name: CurrentIntProperty.zero
desc: Factory constructor for initializing an CurrentIntProperty to zero.

name: abs
desc: Returns the absolute value of this integer.

name: add
desc: Adds other to this number.

name: addNumber
desc: Adds other to this number and returns the numeric result.

name: decrement
desc: Decrement the int value by 1

name: divide
desc: Divides this number by other.

name: increment
desc: Increment the int value by 1

name: isEven
desc: Returns true if the int value is even.

name: isNegative
desc: Whether this number is negative.

name: isOdd
desc: Returns true if the int value is odd

name: mod
desc: Euclidean modulo of this number by other.

name: modNumber
desc: Returns the modulo of this number by other as a numeric result.

name: multiply
desc: Multiplies this number by other.

name: multiplyNumber
desc: Multiplies this number by other and returns the numeric result.

name: subtract
desc: Subtracts other from this number.

name: subtractNumber
desc: Subtracts other from this number and returns the numeric result.

name: toDouble
desc: The int value as a double

name: toZero
desc: Sets the int value to zero.

name: CurrentIntTextController
desc: A CurrentTextController that can only be bound to a CurrentProperty of type int.

name: CurrentListProperty
desc: An CurrentProperty with similar characteristics as a dart List<T>

name: CurrentListProperty.empty
desc: Factory constructor for initializing an CurrentListProperty to an empty List.

name: add
desc:
Adds value to the end of this list,
extending the length by one.

name: addAll
desc: Appends all objects of values to the end of the list.

name: clear
desc: Removes all objects from this list; the length of the list becomes zero.

name: contains
desc: Whether the collection contains an element equal to value.

name: elementAt
desc: Returns the indexth element.

name: first
desc: Returns the first element.

name: firstWhere
desc: Returns the first element that satisfies the given predicate test.

name: firstWhereOrNull
desc: Returns the first element that satisfies the given predicate test.

name: forEach
desc: Invokes action on each element of this iterable in iteration order.

name: hasValueChanged
desc: Determines whether the current value differs from the original value.

name: indexOf
desc: The first index of value in this list.

name: indexWhere
desc: The first index in the list that satisfies the provided test.

name: insert
desc: Inserts element at position index in this list.

name: insertAll
desc:
Inserts all objects of values at position index in this list.
This increases the length of the list by the length of values
and shifts all later objects towards the end of the list.
The list must be growable.
The index must be a valid index in the list or length.

name: insertAllAtEnd
desc:
Inserts values at the end of this list
This increases the length of the list by the length of values

name: isEmpty
desc: Whether this value has no elements.

name: isNotEmpty
desc: Whether this value has no elements.

name: last
desc: Returns the last element.

name: length
desc: The number of objects in this list.

name: map
desc: The current elements of this iterable modified by toElement.

name: operator []
desc: The object at the given index in the list.

name: remove
desc: Removes the first occurrence of value from this list.

name: removeAt
desc: Removes the object at position index from the list.

name: reset
desc: Resets the value to the originalValue.

name: reversed
desc: A List of the objects in this list in reverse order.

name: single
desc: Checks that this has only one element, and returns that element.

name: sublist
desc: Returns a new list containing the elements between start and end.

name: toString
desc:
Returns the current contents of the list as a
formatted String

name: where
desc:
Returns a new List with all elements that satisfy the
predicate test.

name: CurrentMapProperty
desc: An CurrentProperty with similar characteristics as a dart Map<K, V>

name: CurrentMapProperty.empty
desc: Factory constructor for initializing an CurrentMapProperty to an empty Map.

name: add
desc:
If the key is already in this map,
the corresponding value is overwritten.

name: addAll
desc: Adds all key/value pairs of other to this map.

name: addEntries
desc: Adds all key/value pairs of entries to this map.

name: addEntry
desc: Adds the key/value pair to this map.

name: clear
desc: Removes all entries from the map.

name: containsKey
desc: Whether this map contains the given key.

name: containsValue
desc: Whether this map contains the given value.

name: entries
desc: The map entries in the map

name: forEach
desc: Applies action to each key/value pair of the map.

name: hasValueChanged
desc: Determines whether the current value differs from the original value.

name: isEmpty
desc: Whether there is no key/value pair in the map.

name: isNotEmpty
desc: Whether there is at least one key/value pair in the map.

name: keys
desc: The keys of the map.

name: length
desc: The number of key/value pairs in the map.

name: map
desc:
Returns a new map where all entries of this map are transformed by
the given convert function.

name: remove
desc: Removes key and its associated value, if present, from the map.

name: removeWhere
desc: Removes all entries of this map that satisfy the given test.

name: reset
desc: Resets the value to the originalValue.

name: update
desc: Updates the value for the provided key.

name: updateAll
desc: Updates all values.

name: values
desc: The values of the map.

name: CurrentNullableBoolProperty
desc:
An CurrentProperty with similar characteristics as a an
ordinary dart bool object.

name: isFalse
desc: Whether the underlying value is not null and false

name: isTrue
desc: Whether the underlying value is not null and true

name: setFalse
desc: Sets the value to false

name: setNull
desc: Sets the value to null

name: setTrue
desc: Sets the value to true

name: toNull
desc: Sets the value to null

desc:
Works like parse except that this function returns null

desc: Whether the string value contains a match of other.

name: CurrentProperty
desc: Contains any object that will notify any listeners when its value is changed.

name: boolean
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentBoolProperty.

name: call
desc: Updates the underlying value for this CurrentProperty.

name: dateTime
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentDateTimeProperty.

name: doubleProp
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentDoubleProperty.

name: equals
desc: Checks if other is equal to the value of this CurrentProperty.

name: hasValueChanged
desc: Determines whether the current value differs from the original value.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: integer
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentIntProperty.

name: isDirty
desc: Returns true if the value of this CurrentProperty is different from the originalValue.

name: isNotNull
desc: Returns true if the value of this CurrentProperty is not null.

name: isNull
desc: Returns true if the value of this CurrentProperty is null.

name: list
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentListProperty.

name: map
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentMapProperty.

name: nullable
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentProperty with a null value.

name: nullableBoolean
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentNullableBoolProperty.

name: nullableDateTime
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentNullableDateTimeProperty.

name: nullableDouble
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentNullableDoubleProperty.

name: nullableInteger
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentNullableIntProperty.

name: nullableString
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentNullableStringProperty.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: registerBinding
desc: Registers a helper binding against this property.

name: registeredBindings
desc: Helper bindings registered directly against this property.

name: reset
desc: Resets the value to the originalValue.

name: set
desc: Updates the property value. Notifies any listeners to the change

name: setOriginalValueToCurrent
desc: Updates the original value to what the current value of this property is.

name: setViewModel
desc: Links this CurrentProperty instance with an CurrentViewModel.

name: string
desc: Factory constructor for initializing a CurrentStringProperty.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: value
desc:
Returns the current value of this CurrentProperty.
Setting the value will update the value of this CurrentProperty and trigger a UI update if the new value is different from the current value.
If T is a reference type, setting the value to a new instance of T with the same properties as the current value will still trigger a UI update since the reference has changed.

name: viewModel
desc:
Returns the instance of the CurrentViewModel this
property is associated with.

name: CurrentPropertyValidationExtensions
desc: Adds convenience validation helpers to CurrentProperty.

name: createValidation
desc: Creates a CurrentFieldValidation for this property.

name: tryGetValidation
desc: The first validation registered for this property, if any.

name: validation
desc: The first validation registered for this property.

name: CurrentState
desc: Base class for your CurrentWidgets accompanying State class.

name: dispose
desc: Called when this object is removed from the tree permanently.

name: ifBusy
desc:
Can be used to conditionally show another widget if the viewModel is busy running a long
running task.

name: isBusy
desc:
Exposes the viewModel busy status. Used to determine if the viewModel is busy running
a long running task

name: CurrentStateChanged
desc: The event that is added to the State stream.

name: addedAllToList
desc:
A factory method which creates a single CurrentStateChanged object with a description
describing all the values that were added to the list

name: addedEntriesToMap
desc:
A factory method which creates a single CurrentStateChanged object with a description
describing what MapEntry objects were added to the map

name: addedMapToMap
desc:
A factory method which creates a single CurrentStateChanged object with a description
describing what new map values were added to another map

name: addedToList
desc:
A factory method which creates a single CurrentStateChanged object with a description
describing what value was added to the list

name: addedToMap
desc:
A factory method which creates a single CurrentStateChanged object with a description
describing what key/value was added to the map

name: clearedList
desc:
A factory method which creates a single CurrentStateChanged object with a description
stating that the entire list was cleared

name: insertAllIntoList
desc:
A factory method which creates a single CurrentStateChanged object with a description
describing all the values that were inserted into the list at the specified index

name: insertIntoList
desc:
A factory method which creates a single CurrentStateChanged object with a description
describing the value inserted into to the list at the specified index

name: removedFromList
desc:
A factory method which creates a single CurrentStateChanged object with a description
describing what value was removed from the list

name: removedFromMap
desc:
A factory method which creates a single CurrentStateChanged object with a description
describing what key/value was removed from the map

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: updateMapEntry
desc:
A factory method which creates a single CurrentStateChanged object with a description
describing what changes were made to a map entry, including for which key

name: containsPropertyName
desc: Whether the propertyName on any event matches the propertyName argument

name: firstForPropertyName
desc:
Gets the first event where the CurrentStateChanged.propertyName matches the
propertyName argument

name: nextValueFor
desc:
Gets the CurrentStateChanged.nextValue for the first event where the CurrentStateChanged.propertyName
matches the propertyName argument

name: previousValueFor
desc:
Gets the CurrentStateChanged.previousValue for the first event where the CurrentStateChanged.propertyName
matches the propertyName argument

name: CurrentStringProperty
desc: An CurrentProperty with similar characteristics as a dart String object

name: CurrentStringProperty.empty
desc: Factory constructor for initializing an CurrentStringProperty to an empty String.

name: contains
desc: Whether the string value contains a match of other.

name: isEmpty
desc: Whether the string value is empty

name: isNotEmpty
desc: Whether the string value is empty or not

name: length
desc: The length of the string value.

name: substring
desc: The substring of the string value from start, inclusive, to end, exclusive.

name: toEmpty
desc: Sets the string value to an empty string.

name: CurrentStringTextController
desc: A CurrentTextController that can only be bound to a CurrentProperty of type String.

name: CurrentTextController
desc:
A TextEditingController that keeps a CurrentProperty and a text field in
sync.

name: dateTime
desc: Factory constructor to create a CurrentTextController for a DateTime property.

name: defaultValidationIssues
desc:
Global default issues used when a binding does not provide
CurrentTextControllerValidationIssues explicitly.

name: dispose
desc:
Discards any resources used by the object. After this is called, the
object is not in a usable state and should be discarded (calls to
addListener will throw after the object is disposed).

name: formValidator
desc:
Creates a stock Flutter FormField.validator callback for this
controller.

name: integer
desc: Factory constructor to create a CurrentTextController for an integer property.

name: isSynchronizingText
desc:
Whether the controller is currently applying a synchronized text update
from the bound property.

name: nullableDateTime
desc: Factory constructor to create a CurrentTextController for a nullable DateTime property.

name: nullableInteger
desc: Factory constructor to create a CurrentTextController for a nullable integer property.

name: nullableString
desc: Factory constructor to create a CurrentTextController for a nullable String  property.

name: of
desc: Factory constructor to create a CurrentTextController for a type specified by the generic parameter T.

name: previewValidationIssue
desc:
Computes the current validation issue for the controller text without
mutating validation state.

name: string
desc: Factory constructor to create a CurrentTextController for a String property.

name: synchronizeValidation
desc: Synchronizes validation metadata with the controller's current text.

name: visibleErrorText
desc:
Resolves the currently visible validation error for text-field style
widgets that still use InputDecoration.errorText directly.

name: CurrentTextControllerFormValidatorBuilder
desc: Builds a FormFieldValidator from a CurrentTextController.

name: CurrentTextControllerRequiredValueIssueBuilder
desc: A TextEditingController that is bound to a CurrentProperty.

name: CurrentTextControllerValidationIssues
desc: Supplies controller-generated validation issues for CurrentTextController.

name: CurrentTextControllerValidationIssues.new
desc: Creates a set of controller-generated validation issue builders.

name: invalidValueIssue
desc: Returns the invalid-value issue for the provided text, if configured.

name: invalidValueIssueBuilder
desc: Builder used when text cannot be parsed into the target property type.

name: requiredValueIssue
desc: Returns the required-value issue, if configured.

name: requiredValueIssueBuilder
desc:
Builder used when a non-nullable field is cleared and no default value is
available.

name: CurrentTextControllersLifecycleMixin
desc: A mixin for managing the lifecycle of CurrentTextControllers in a CurrentState.

name: activate
desc:
Called when this object is reinserted into the tree after having been
removed via deactivate.

name: build
desc: Describes the part of the user interface represented by this widget.

name: context
desc: The location in the tree where this widget builds.

name: controllersInitialized
desc: Whether the CurrentTextControllers have been initialized. This is used to ensure that the controllers are only initialized once.

name: deactivate
desc: Called when this object is removed from the tree.

name: debugFillProperties
desc: Add additional properties associated with the node.

name: didChangeDependencies
desc: Called when a dependency of this State object changes.

name: didUpdateWidget
desc: Called whenever the widget configuration changes.

name: dispose
desc: Called when this object is removed from the tree permanently.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: ifBusy
desc:
Can be used to conditionally show another widget if the viewModel is busy running a long
running task.

name: initState
desc: Called when this object is inserted into the tree.

name: isBusy
desc:
Exposes the viewModel busy status. Used to determine if the viewModel is busy running
a long running task

name: mounted
desc: Whether this State object is currently in a tree.

name: noSuchMethod
desc: Invoked when a nonexistent method or property is accessed.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: reassemble
desc:
Called whenever the application is reassembled during debugging, for
example during hot reload.

name: runtimeType
desc: A representation of the runtime type of the object.

name: setState
desc: Notify the framework that the internal state of this object has changed.

name: toDiagnosticsNode
desc:
Returns a debug representation of the object that is used by debugging
tools and by DiagnosticsNode.toStringDeep.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: toStringShort
desc:
A brief description of this object, usually just the runtimeType and the
hashCode.

name: widget
desc: The current configuration.

name: CurrentTextField
desc: A convenience TextField wired to a CurrentTextController.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: CurrentTextFormField
desc: A convenience TextFormField wired to a CurrentTextController.

name: build
desc: Describes the part of the user interface represented by this widget.

name: CurrentValidationChanged
desc: Event sent when the validation metadata for a field changes.

name: CurrentValidationChanged.new
desc: Creates a validation change event for the provided property.

name: validationSourceHashCode
desc: Unique identifier for the validation instance that emitted this event.

name: CurrentValidationGroup
desc: Aggregates multiple CurrentFieldValidation instances.

name: CurrentValidationGroup.forProperties
desc: Creates a group from properties that already have registered validators.

name: CurrentValidationGroup.new
desc: Creates a group from the provided validations.

name: firstIssue
desc: The first issue currently reported by the group, if any.

name: hasIssues
desc: Whether any validator in the group currently has an issue.

name: isValid
desc: Whether every validator in the group is currently valid.

name: resetAll
desc: Resets every validator in the group back to the untouched state.

name: resolveFirstIssueText
desc: Resolves the first issue currently reported by the group, if any.

name: validateAll
desc: Validates every field in the group.

name: validations
desc: The validators tracked by this group.

name: CurrentValidationIssue
desc: Describes a validation failure without tying it to a specific locale.

name: CurrentValidationIssue.invalidValue
desc: Creates an issue representing a parse or invalid-value failure.

name: CurrentValidationIssue.localize
desc: Allows creation of an issue with a context-dependent message.

name: CurrentValidationIssue.message
desc: Creates an issue backed only by a fallback message.

name: CurrentValidationIssue.new
desc: Creates a validation issue with a stable code.

name: CurrentValidationIssue.requiredValue
desc: Creates an issue representing a required-value failure.

name: arguments
desc: Optional structured arguments that a resolver can use when building text.

name: code
desc: Stable identifier for the validation failure.

name: contextTextBuilder
desc: Optional builder used when display text depends on a BuildContext.

name: fallbackMessage
desc: Optional fallback text for environments that do not provide a resolver.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: resolveText
desc: Resolves this issue into display text.

name: CurrentValidationIssueContextTextBuilder
desc:
Resolves a CurrentValidationIssue into display text using a
BuildContext.

name: CurrentValidationIssueTextResolver
desc: Resolves a CurrentValidationIssue into display text.

name: CurrentValidationRule
desc: Signature for a synchronous validation rule used by CurrentFieldValidation.

name: CurrentValidationState
desc: Represents the current validation metadata for a field.

name: CurrentValidationState.new
desc: Creates a validation state with the provided metadata.

name: CurrentValidationState.untouched
desc: Creates the default untouched validation state.

name: copyWith
desc: Creates a copy of this validation state with selected values replaced.

name: hasIssue
desc: Whether the state currently contains a validation issue.

name: hasValidated
desc: Whether validation has run at least once for the field.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: isTouched
desc: Whether the field has been touched by the current validation workflow.

name: isValid
desc: Whether the current state is valid.

name: issue
desc: The current validation issue for the field.

name: lastValidatedValue
desc: The most recent value that was validated.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: CurrentValue
desc: Base class for CurrentProperty

name: CurrentViewModel
desc:
A ViewModel is an abstraction of the view it is bound to and represents the current state of
the data in your model.

name: addAnyErrorEventListener
desc: Adds an event handler for all ErrorEvent values

name: addAnyStateChangedListener
desc: Adds an event handler for all CurrentStateChanged events.

name: addBusyStatusChangedListener
desc: Subscribes to changes in the busy status of the view model.

name: addOnErrorEventListener
desc: Adds an event handler which gets executed each time notifyError is called.

name: addStateChangedListener
desc: Adds an event handler which gets executed each time an event of type T is added to the state stream.

name: assignTo
desc: Creates associates the view model with a specific CurrentState via the states hash code.

name: assignedTo
desc: The CurrentState identifier that the view model is currently assigned to

name: assignedToState
desc: Whether the view model has already been assigned to a CurrentState

name: busy
desc: Whether the view model is currently busy performing a long running task. Can be used by the UI to show a loading indicator or prevent user interaction.

name: cancelSubscription
desc: Cancels the subscription. The subscriber will stop receiving events

name: currentBindings
desc:
Provides a list of helper bindings that should attach after the view model
has assigned itself to all currentProps.

name: currentProps
desc: Provides a list of CurrentProperty fields in the CurrentViewModel.

name: dispose
desc: Closes the state and error streams and removes any listeners associated with those streams

name: doAsync
desc: Executes a long running task asynchronously.

name: isDirty
desc: Whether any of the properties defined in currentProps have a value that is different from their original value.

name: isTaskInProgress
desc: Checks if the view model is busy working on a specific task.

name: notifyChange
desc: Inform the bound CurrentState that the state of the UI needs to be updated with a single event.

name: notifyChanges
desc: Inform the bound CurrentState that the state of the UI needs to be updated.

name: notifyError
desc: Inform the bound CurrentState that an error has occurred.

name: releaseFrom
desc:
Releases the current CurrentState assignment when it matches the
provided state identifier.

name: resetAll
desc:
Resets the value of all properties defined in the currentProps list
to their original value.

name: setBusy
desc: Sets the busy status to true

name: setBusyStatus
desc: Explicitly updates the current busy status of the view model.

name: setMultiple
desc: Set multiple CurrentProperty values, but only trigger a single state change

name: setNotBusy
desc: Sets the busy status to false

name: CurrentViewModelBinding
desc:
Contract for helper objects that need to attach themselves to a
CurrentViewModel after all CurrentProperty values have been initialized.

name: attachToViewModel
desc: Attaches this helper to its owning CurrentViewModel.

name: CurrentWidget
desc: Base class for any widget that needs to be updated when the state of your widget changes.

name: createCurrent
desc: Create an instance of CurrentState for this widget.

name: createState
desc:
Avoid overriding this function. createCurrent handles the creation of the widget state.
Overriding this function can have unintended side affects. You've been warned.

name: disposeViewModel
desc: Whether this widget owns the lifecycle of the provided viewModel.

name: ErrorEvent
desc: The event that is added to the Error stream.

name: getMetaData
desc: Tries to get a value from the metaData map by key.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: createNullProperty
desc: Short hand helper function for initializing an CurrentProperty with a null value.

name: createProperty
desc: Short hand helper function for initializing an CurrentProperty.
